name: oh-my-agents-synthesis
description: Unified AI agent orchestration plugin for OpenCode - synthesizes oh-my-opencode-slim and oh-my-openagent architectures with 5-model LOOM routing

scripts.build:plugin: bun build src/index.ts src/tui.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external @ast-grep/napi --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/solid --external jsdom --external zod
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target node --format esm --external @ast-grep/napi --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk --external jsdom --external zod
scripts.build: bun run build:plugin && bun run build:cli
